name: PostHog
description: Product analytics, feature flags, experiments, error tracking, and LLM analytics via the official PostHog MCP server

fields.label: PostHog Personal API Key
fields.description: Personal API key with MCP Server preset (see https://app.posthog.com/settings/user-api-keys?preset=mcp_server)

mcpUrl.description: PostHog MCP endpoint URL (customize for self-hosted instances)

features.description: Comma-separated list of features to enable (workspace,error-tracking,dashboards,insights,experiments,flags,llm-analytics,docs)
